title: Circadian Circuits
description: Brighton drum & bass heavyweight Circadian announces his first-ever UK headline show, debuting in his hometown inside the iconic Spiegeltent this May — setting the scene for a truly unique setting for a one-of-a-kind drum & bass experience in the city centre. His tracks have been causing havoc on dancefloors globally and featured heavily in DJ sets over the past few years, experiencing a meteoric rise in the Drum & Bass Scene. Circadian now brings everything together for a special 90-minute journey set, showcasing his sound like never before. Joined by two of the freshest and most exciting names in the scene, T-Lex and Ora, this is a one-off show not to be missed by D&B fans.
